wormhole.title: On Changing Tides
wormhole.content:
We try to apply permanence to a world that is always changing.
We build lighthouses on shifting shorelines.
[click here](www.google.com) to read the full collection.

wormhole.title: Decay and Return
wormhole.content:
A house is just material rearranged.
A nest to hold us for a single season.
From environment to home and back again.
